channel.title: Twitter - @elonmusk
channel.description: 自动生成的Twitter RSS - 最后更新: 2026-04-13 02:52 UTC | 来源实例: https://xcancel.com

item.title: @elonmusk: Sowell is awesome and always right
item.description: Sowell is awesome and always right

item.title: @elonmusk: Couldn't agree more. Smooth on FSD roadtrips. SbW and rear-steer makes manual driving easy in comfor...
item.description: Couldn't agree more. Smooth on FSD roadtrips. SbW and rear-steer makes manual driving easy in comfort mode and fun in sport mode. Impressively capable off-road. Toughness on the outside so I never have to worry and just looks awesome.

item.title: @elonmusk: Whatever else you believe about Elon, he is extremely sincere. He means everything he says. That’s a...
item.description: Whatever else you believe about Elon, he is extremely sincere. He means everything he says. That’s a rare quality, and probably a key to his success. It should be very whitepilling that this trait leads to success.

item.title: @elonmusk: 5 years ago, my little girl was secretly being groomed and transitioned at her public school. 4 year...
item.description: 5 years ago, my little girl was secretly being groomed and transitioned at her public school. 4 years ago, she was still lost in a dark cloud, suicidal, identifying as a “boy” named Toby. Last night, she went to her first prom with her boyfriend — glowing with confidence and grace. Thank you, Jesus, for saving her. 🙏🏼 What the enemy meant for evil, God is turning into good. If you’re a parent fighting for your child right now and it feels hopeless, please hold on. There is light on the other side. I won’t stop fighting for your horror story to have a happy ending, too.

item.title: @elonmusk: envy drives so much of human behavior people who are smart and envious are especially dangerous beca...
item.description: envy drives so much of human behavior people who are smart and envious are especially dangerous because they will rationalize their envy until they feel *virtuous* in stealing from and killing those they envy

item.title: @elonmusk: You don’t understand how comfortable the Cybertruck is until you try it. I highly recommend you take...
item.description: You don’t understand how comfortable the Cybertruck is until you try it. I highly recommend you take a test drive. Its ride quality is better than the Cadillac Escalade.

item.title: @elonmusk: Making something people love is mostly making something you love and hoping the overlap is real
item.description: Making something people love is mostly making something you love and hoping the overlap is real

item.title: @elonmusk: Elon Musk is right. The South African government is both racist and incompetent to the core. For too...
item.description: Elon Musk is right. The South African government is both racist and incompetent to the core. For too long did they get away with calling themselves "the children of Mandela" to curry favour in the international arena, while they have become the very thing they claim to oppose.

item.title: @elonmusk: All the politicians in South Africa who push their viciously racist laws should be sanctioned, barre...
item.description: All the politicians in South Africa who push their viciously racist laws should be sanctioned, barred from travel, declared criminals and have their international assets seized

item.title: @elonmusk: An insane double-standard. Who is pushing this? We should identify the people and organizations by n...
item.description: An insane double-standard. Who is pushing this? We should identify the people and organizations by name.

item.title: @elonmusk: Each cross is a murdered family
item.description: Each cross is a murdered family

item.title: @elonmusk: The RDW often sets the standards that influences almost all of Europe, so now that the RDW has appro...
item.description: The RDW often sets the standards that influences almost all of Europe, so now that the RDW has approved (type approval) FSD (Supervised), we should expect much quicker approval in other European countries.

item.title: @elonmusk: South Africa won’t allow Starlink to be licensed, even though I was BORN THERE, simply because I am ...
item.description: South Africa won’t allow Starlink to be licensed, even though I was BORN THERE, simply because I am not Black! We were offered many times the opportunity to bribe our way to a license by pretending that a Black guy runs Starlink SA, but I have refused to do so on principle. Racism should not be rewarded no matter to which race it is applied. Shame on the racist politicians in South Africa. They should be shown no respect whatsoever anywhere in the world and shunned for being unashamedly RACISTS!
